title: Too Many Enchantments
description: Enchantments that shouldn't be in Minecraft
body:
This mod adds 10 different enchantments to Minecraft, including:
- Thunder Strike(channeling for sword)
- Wind Strike(levitates target to give the wielder an advantage)
- Suspicious Strike(random effects)
- Poison Strike(poison effect)
- Wither Strike(withering effect)
- Freezing(slows enemy down)
- Dullness(damage reduction)
- Unprotection(receives more damage)
- Prick(hurts the wielder)
- TNT(spawns TNT)

Each of these has its own unique effects and features, enjoy!
